opportunities.title: HR Generalist
opportunities.description:
Human Resources Generalist (Remote)

Role & Responsibilities

Provide HR services to support candidates, employees, and managers across multiple locations. Manage key HR processes such as employment offers, onboarding, employee relations, policies, leaves of absence, and terminations, utilizing HRIS systems. Collaborate with recruitment on hiring and updates, coordinate meetings with managers, conduct exit interviews, and assist with benefits and employee issues. Support and potentially back-up HR management functions related to HRIS, benefits,

opportunities.description:
[Hiring] – Graphic Designer (Full-Time) $20 – $30/Hourly

Fully Remote Job Opening 🚀 Role – Graphic Designer Salary – $20 – $30/Hourly Location – Remote, United States About the Company – Qureos is an AI-powered hiring platform that connects job seekers with employers while streamlining recruitment through intelligent talent matching. The company is seeking a Graphic Designer to create engaging digital and print marketing materials, social media creatives, brand assets, and visual campaigns while collaborating with cross-functional teams to maintain a consistent brand identity.
